====Status unknown====
Arven is shown with a {{p|Maschiff}} in Battle Studies classes, despite his {{p|Mabosstiff}} already being fully evolved prior to the beginning of the game. After completing Path of Legends, Arven instead uses his Mabosstiff during Battle Studies classes. Its relation to Arven's Mabosstiff is unknown.
